pattern: Pairing each name with its height and sorting those pairs by height in descending order recovers the requested name ordering directly.
hints: Each name is tied to exactly one height, so keep them together.
Sorting by height from largest to smallest gives the order you must return the names in.
Zip names with heights, sort the pairs by height descending, then read off the names.

stress.description: many people with distinct heights via a shuffled permutation
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    heights = list(range(1, n + 1))
    rng.shuffle(heights)
    names = ['p' + str(i) for i in range(n)]
    return [names, heights]
stress.note: distinct heights guarantee a unique ordering
